subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of the All-Merciful and ye who are attracted to the Beauty of the All-Glorious! The sea of tribulations surgeth upon you from every direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای رحمن و منجذبان جمال یزدان بحر بلایا از جمیع جهات بر شما هیجان و نهر
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
